testCases.title: Coupon API — Admin Marketing Module Available
testCases.notes: Marketing module accessible from admin navigation. Contains: Promotions, Coupons, Content management. API backed by marketing module REST endpoints.

testCases.title: Coupon API — 4 Active Coupons via Storefront
testCases.notes: 4 coupons confirmed active via storefront verification: QA Fixed Dollar Off ($5), Simple QA Coupon (5%), Register and get 15% for all (15%), QA Exclusivity Test Globally Exclusive (10%). API manages these coupons.

testCases.title: Coupon API — VCST-4896 Coupons Feature Verification
testCases.notes: VCST-4896 [Marketing] [Cart] Coupons sidebar fully functional. API serves coupon list to storefront cart. Coupon sidebar data loaded via xAPI. API response drives storefront coupon display.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Coupon Validity Dates Correct
testCases.notes: All active coupons: Expires Jan 1, 2027. API returns coupon validity data. Storefront renders expiry dates from API response.

testCases.title: Coupon API — BestRewardPromotionPolicy in Effect
testCases.notes: Per project memory: BestRewardPromotionPolicy preferentially applies coupon-backed rewards over automatic. API applies this policy when processing cart with multiple eligible promotions.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Automatic Promotion Applied
testCases.notes: Pre-applied -$0.01 discount in storefront ORDER SUMMARY. API automatically applies eligible promotions without coupon code. Cart API response includes calculated discount.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Custom Code Input (Storefront)
testCases.notes: 'Custom code' input in storefront DISCOUNT & COUPONS section. Input submits to coupon validation API endpoint. API validates coupon code against active promotions.

testCases.title: Coupon API — View All Coupons Endpoint
testCases.notes: 'View all coupons & promotions' link in storefront. Resolves to promotions listing page (likely /account/coupons or /promotions). API provides full coupon/promotion list.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Globally Exclusive Coupon API Flag
testCases.notes: 'QA Exclusivity Test - Globally Exclusive en' — API flag marks this promotion as globally exclusive. When applied, API excludes other promotions from cart calculation per BestRewardPromotionPolicy.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Order Summary Recalculation
testCases.notes: ORDER SUMMARY: Subtotal $100.00, Discount -$0.01, Tax +$20.00, Shipping $0.00, Total $119.99. API recalculates order total when promotions applied. Tax calculated on post-discount subtotal.

testCases.title: Coupon API — xAPI GraphQL Coupon Queries
testCases.notes: Storefront loads coupons via GraphQL xAPI. DISCOUNT & COUPONS sidebar data from xAPI response. Coupon eligibility and details served via xAPI. Verified by storefront coupon display.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Cart Mutation with Coupon
testCases.notes: Cart mutations (addOrUpdateCartShipment — which has ApolloError BUG-042-001) include coupon context. Coupon application is part of cart update flow. API handles coupon + cart state atomically.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Coupon Applied to B2B Cart
testCases.notes: B2B org user (Carlos Rodriguez / BuildRight) sees 4 applicable coupons. API scopes coupon eligibility to B2B context. Org-level coupon eligibility verified.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Storefront Coupon Sidebar Loading
testCases.notes: DISCOUNT & COUPONS section loads without errors on /cart page. Coupon list renders from API. No loading errors or empty states.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Quote Request Compatible with Coupons
testCases.notes: QUOTE REQUEST section coexists with DISCOUNT & COUPONS in cart. API handles both quote and coupon workflows simultaneously.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Coupon Discount Type: Fixed Amount
testCases.notes: $5 QA Fixed Dollar Off — fixed amount discount type. API correctly processes fixed_amount promotion type. Amount applied as absolute value off cart subtotal.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Create Coupon via Admin API
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: REST API POST /api/marketing/promotions to create new coupon deferred. Existing coupons verified via storefront display.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Get Coupon List via REST API
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: GET /api/marketing/promotions REST call deferred. Coupon list verified via storefront xAPI.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Delete Coupon via Admin API
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: DELETE /api/marketing/promotions/{id} deferred to avoid disrupting test coupon data.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Update Coupon Validity via API
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: PUT /api/marketing/promotions/{id} to update validity dates deferred.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Invalid Coupon Code Rejection
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Submitting invalid coupon code to storefront not executed in this run. API expected to return validation error for invalid codes.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Coupon Application and Cart Total Update
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Applying coupon code and verifying ORDER SUMMARY recalculation not executed. Would change cart state affecting downstream test assertions.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Promotion Conflicts Resolution
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Testing promotion conflict resolution (exclusive coupon vs automatic discount) requires applying coupon code. BestRewardPromotionPolicy logic deferred.

testCases.title: Coupon API — Admin Coupon Report / Statistics
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Promotion usage statistics and reporting in Admin Marketing deferred. Requires separate admin navigation test.
